payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial vertical edge crop of a narrow gold-toned picture frame with a beaded inner molding, revealing part of the framed painted scene (sky and figures) at the right; appears wall-mounted and slightly worn — estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.
